title: Auto Unequip Armor
description: This mod automatically moves your Armor and Totem of Undying into your inventory when you respawn
body:
<center>

[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)  

# ⚔️ AutoUnequip

**AutoUnequip** is a client-side mod designed to automatically moves your Armor and Totem of Undying into your inventory when you respawn.

</center>

---

## ✨ Features
- **Automatic Unequip** – Armor and Totem of Undying are moved to your inventory right after respawning.  
- **Configurable Delay** – Set a custom delay before unequipping gear via `config`.  
- **Inventory Management** – Finds free slots automatically; if no space is available, items are safely dropped.  

---

## Mod Made For a Commision
